rds.dbsubnet.group.DBSubnetGroupDescript.Docs: The description for the DB Subnet Group.

rds.dbsubnet.group.DBSubnetGroupName.Docs: The name for the DB subnet group. This value is stored as a lowercase string.  Constraints: Must contain no more than 255 lowercase alphanumeric characters or hyphens. Must not be "Default".  Example: `mysubnetgroup`

rds.dbsubnet.group.SubnetIds.Docs: The EC2 Subnet IDs for the DB Subnet Group.

rds.dbsubnet.group.Tags.Docs: Tags to assign to the DB subnet group.
